# tfe_no_code_module

This data source can be used to retrieve a public or private no-code module.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID of the no-code module.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Indiate if this no-code module is currently enabled.
- `namespace` (String) The namespace of the no-code module.
- `organization` (String) Name of the organization.
- `registry_module_id` (String) ID of the registry module.
- `version_pin` (String) Version pin of the no-code module.
